# totalSizeInBytes

**Instance Property**

The total size in bytes of all data types contained in this data record.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var totalSizeInBytes: Int { get }
```

## Related Documentation

- **sizeInBytes(ofTypes:)**: Retrieves the size in bytes of the specific data types in this data record.
